template.name: docker-build
template.content:
#!/bin/sh # /** # * Copyright (c) 2013-Now https://jeesite.com All rights reserved. # * No deletion without permission, or be held responsible to law. # * # * Author: ThinkGem@163.com # * # */ echo "" echo "[信息] 打包Web工程，编译Docker镜像。" echo ""
if [ -n "$JAVA_HOME8" ] && [ -d "$JAVA_HOME8" ]; then export JAVA_HOME="$JAVA_HOME8" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" fi mvn -v echo ""
cd .. mvn clean package docker:remove docker:build -Dmaven.test.skip=true -U
cd bin
